body: {"rationale":"Strong bead overall. Title is imperative and names the subsystem. Description has PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE with file:line citations, PROPOSED FIX with concrete deliverables, and NON-SCOPE. AC items are numbered; items 3–6 name specific Test* functions and a go test -run filter; items 7–8 are the standard green-gate and lefthook lines. Labels include phase, story, area, kind, and cross-refs (adr, spec, split-from). Parent is explicit. DEPS section states no deps. One deduction: AC item 2 is partially verifiable ('instead of setting those terminal decisions entirely inline') but does not name a specific test that proves the wiring — item 4 covers this partially but its assertion is about exit_reason string equality, not that the inline set-sites are gone. A reviewer given only this bead body could execute it without asking. Minor gap only.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":["AC item 2: add or reference a specific test assertion (e.g. grep or vet step) that confirms the old inline exit_reason assignments at the cited lines are removed, not just that the new path emits the same strings.","Consider adding a self-contained description note confirming the agent should check git log or the split-from bead for context on what ddx-9228a484 landed, since the description references 'closed dependencies … already landed' without naming what was merged."],"waivers_applied":[]}
